uses-permission.documentation:comment: Basic permission to monitor the network state, identifying when the app is online for its basic functionality.
This permission is used by Work Manager to manage background work, in this case, used to sync bookmarks in the background.
Basic permission to access the internet and reach the bookmark services.
This permission instructs Android to run the application every time you start your phone. The app then schedules its background work to keep bookmarks up-to-date.
This permission is used by Work Manager to manage background work, in this case, used to sync bookmarks in the background.

This is not a real permission, but rather a quirk. It is used with API level 33 and above (Android 13+), simply meaning that the application intends to send intents – but only to itself, while rejecting them from elsewhere.

permission.documentation:comment: This is not a real permission, but rather a quirk. It is used with API level 33 and above (Android 13+), simply meaning that the application intends to send intents – but only to itself, while rejecting them from elsewhere.
